title: Reasons to Add Alliant Energy (LNT) to Your Portfolio Now
text: Alliant Energy (LNT) continues to serve its customers efficiently and is making significant investments to strengthen its existing operations further.

title: Utilities Are Still Undervalued And Some Are A Buy
text: The Utility sector has struggled due to rising interest rates and inflation, resulting in share price declines and high dividend yields. California Water Service Group, Alliant Energy, and WEC Energy Group are identified as buying opportunities in the utility sector. These companies have faced challenges but offer strong dividend growth, and solid dividend safety, and are undervalued compared to historical values.
